title: Public admin surface minimization
evidence: Public admin host in ingress.yaml and unauthenticated /admin/users route in src/server.js
recommendation: Remove public admin exposure and require authenticated admin authorization.

title: Secrets externalized from source code
evidence: JWT_SECRET fallback and committed user passwords in src/auth.js
recommendation: Move secrets to runtime injection and rotate exposed values.

title: Sensitive data exclusion or masking in logs
evidence: Login request bodies are logged in src/server.js
recommendation: Stop logging sensitive request bodies and mask auth telemetry.

title: Failed-login lockout or abuse throttling
evidence: No visible throttling or lockout around /login in src/server.js
recommendation: Add rate limiting, lockout, or gateway abuse protections.

title: Object-level authorization enforcement
evidence: GET /admin/users returns Object.values(USERS) without an auth check
recommendation: Protect the route with authenticated admin authorization and private exposure controls.

title: SSRF and outbound request trust control
recommendation: Validate destinations, add allowlists, and block private or link-local targets.

title: CI/CD trust boundary protection
evidence: pull_request_target workflow echoes PROD_API_KEY in ci/deploy.yml
recommendation: Remove privileged secret exposure from untrusted PR execution.

title: Secret exposure prevention
evidence: Weak fallback JWT secret and plaintext credentials in src/auth.js
recommendation: Require managed secrets and remove committed credentials.
